title: PopChoice — AI Movie Recommender
description: AI-powered movie recommendation platform that uses semantic vector search and large language models to deliver personalized recommendations for groups of users.
howItWorks: The app collects movie preferences from each person in the group and combines their responses into a single text representation. OpenAI converts that text into an embedding, which is compared against a Supabase pgvector database containing embeddings for approximately 100 movies. The most similar movies are retrieved through a vector similarity search and enriched with posters and metadata from the TMDB API. OpenAI then generates a personalized summary explaining why each movie matches the group's preferences.
challenges: The main challenge was refining the prompts and retrieval flow so that each recommendation was relevant to the entire group rather than focusing too heavily on a single preference.
